Rahul K.A

Robotics, embedded systems , and computer graphics dev!

Resume

About Me

M.S.E Robotics graduate student at Johns Hopkins University. I have worked in projects involving robotics, computer vision, computer graphics, and embedded systems.

Experience

Uhnder India

Engineer, Radar Application Software - August 2023 - September 2024

Part of the Radar Application Software team, in charge of maintaining RTOS integration within Uhnder's radar, and developing new features requested by customers

  • Built support for multicast packet transmission and packet fragmentation in Uhnder's radar by porting an embedded RTOS-based IP stack into the radar
  • Improved time synchronization precision in Uhnder's radar from the scale of milliseconds to nanoseconds by porting the Precision Time Protocol daemon (PTPd) into the radar
  • Enhanced the flexibility of Uhnder’s Software Development Kit (SDK) by replacing interrupt-driven services, with pre-emptive RTOS-based equivalents
  • Increased software development speed by porting a POSIX wrapper for FreeRTOS to Uhnder’s SDK, making the development of embedded applications more accessible
  • Ensured compliance to industry standards by contributing to SWE.1 and SWE.2 processes for ASPICE
  • Improved ROS/ROS2 capabilities by maintaining and adding features to Uhnder’s ROS and ROS2 repositories
  • Enhanced data visualization capabilities by forking and adding features to the Foxglove Visualization platform
  • Improved data collection processes by writing automated scripts to format radar data
C++ (MISRA) C FreeRTOS ROS/ROS2 UDP/IP Ethernet Precision Time Protocol (PTP) Lua Python

Uhnder India

Intern, Radar Application Software - December 2022 - August 2023

Part of the Radar Application Software team, in charge of maintaining RTOS integration within Uhnder's radar, and developing new features requested by customers

  • Ensured compliance with industry standards by implementing ISO-23150 compliant data structures for radar data transmission
  • Improved debugging efficiency for developers by designing a Lua plugin for Wireshark that enables parsing of Uhnder’s proprietary communication protocol
C++ (MISRA) FreeRTOS ROS/ROS2 Lua

PSG College of Technology

Structure From Motion

Implemented a Structure From Motion package using OpenCV, C++, and PCL. Feature detection done using SURF, and bundle adjustment done using the CVSBA library

C++ OpenCV PCL

Festo Robotino ROS2 Package

My first major contribution to the ROS community! I saw that there weren't any packages for the Robotino 3, so I decided to make one myself.

C++ ROS2

PID Control for Autonomous Vehicles

Implemented PID controllers for throttle and steering inputs. The target speed and steering values were preset, and the contoller acts on the car to follow the optimal values. Tested on Carla simulator.

Python PID Control

OpenGL Rendering System

Developed a rendering system using OpenGL and C++ that provides point, spot, and directional lighting, along with shadows. The system also allows importing meshes using ASSIMP

OpenGL C++

E-Yantra Agribot

Developed and implemented a state-machine based laser navigation algorithm in ROS and Gazebo for autonomously traversing a greenhouse.

Python ROS

Resolved Rate Control for 6-DOF Robot Arm

Implemented resolved rate control, along with inverse kinematic control, for the UR5 6-DOF robot arm.

MATLAB ROS2
